paragraphs: Ignoring Arc Flash risks can be costly, not only for human lives but also in financial terms. A proactive Arc Flash Risk Assessment prevents disasters and ensures uninterrupted operations.

Carelabs is an Electrical Safety Testing company that offers precise arc flash analysis to Indian industries. Their expertly trained team makes sure to keep it compliant, reduce risks, and enhance workplace safety.
Protect your workforce and business with a professional arc flash study-contact Carelabs for an exhaustive safety assessment.

bulletLists: Our Services Arc Flash Study Relay Coordination Study Short Circuit Analysis Load Flow Analysis
Our Services Arc Flash Study Relay Coordination Study Short Circuit Analysis Load Flow Analysis
Ensures Compliance : As per Indian electrical safety regulations, arc flash studies are mandatory. So, to comply with such standards, businesses must conduct arc flash hazard analysis.
Reduces Equipment Damage : Through arc flash study, industries can spot weak points in the electrical system; thereby, preventing costly breakdowns.
Protects Employees : Implementing arc flash protection measures, helps protect their employees from life-threatening injuries.
Data Collection & System Analysis : Gathering critical information concerning electrical systems and identifying risk-prone areas.
Study Short Circuit & Coordination : Analyzing fault currents and ensuring that the relays coordinate properly for improved protection.
Arc Flash Boundary Determination : Measuring the safe distance to mitigate powerful blasts against personnel.
Personal Protective Equipment Selection : Based on the type of industry, Carelabs, suggests Arc Flash Suit & Arc Flash PPE to protect the workers.
Compliance with safety standards : Making sure that the recommendations align with the norms of Indian and International Safety Standards.
